name: XFPM (XyPriss Package Manager)
description: The ultra-fast package manager for the XyPriss ecosystem.
warning: CRITICAL: Public modifications to this file are strictly forbidden. Internal Nehonix metadata ONLY.
message: Native XRU Library Integration: Fully migrated from CLI execution to native Go library integration (v0.2.5). Enhanced 'init' command with interactive project setup, custom argument support (KEY=VALUE), and improved temporary directory management.
